allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\valle\\flores-siberianas" -Recurse -Force -Depth 2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "supabase|migration|schema" -and $_.FullName -notmatch "node_modules" } | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\valle\\flores-siberianas" -Recurse -Force -Depth 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \($_.Extension -eq ".sql" -or $_.Name -match "supabase|migration"\) -and $_.FullName -notmatch "node_modules|\\.next" } | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($out = \(npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1 | Out-String\); $real = \($out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "error TS" -and $_ -notmatch "\\.next" }\); Write-Output "Real errors: $\($real.Count\)"; if \($real.Count -gt 0\) { $real })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force "C:\\Users\\valle\\flores-siberianas\\src\\lib\\farm" | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | ForEach-Object { "{0,8} {1}" -f $_.Length, $_.Name }; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force "C:\\Users\\valle\\flores-siberianas\\src\\components\\Farm" | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | ForEach-Object { "{0,8} {1}" -f $_.Length, $_.Name }; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force "C:\\Users\\valle\\flores-siberianas\\src\\app\\proveedor-portal" -Filter "page.tsx" | ForEach-Object { "{0,8} {1}" -f $_.Length, $_.FullName.Substring\("C:\\Users\\valle\\flores-siberianas\\".Length\) })

PowerShell($out = \(npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1 | Out-String\); $real = \($out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "error TS" -and $_ -notmatch "\\.next" }\); Write-Output "Real errors: $\($real.Count\)")
